roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ATTY REQ TO ADD TO CAL TO CORRECT CREDIT CALCULATION

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE COURT VACATES THE PREVIOUS SENTENCE OF 07-22-14,  THE COURT IMPOSES SENTENCE AS FOLLOWS:/3000REIN/PAJ:160 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  71  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 06-17-14 FOR GOOD CAUSE /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENTPER PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:WITNESSES ARE SWORN AND EXAMINED, AND EVIDENCE IS MARKED AND ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE ON BEHALF OF THE PEOPLE,  BOTH SIDES ARGUE AND SUBMIT,/X:THE COURTFINDS THE PAROLEE IN GENERAL VIOLATION OF HIS PAROLE,  THE COURT FINDS NOEVIDENCE OF THE VIOLATION OF ABSCONDING, AND DISMISSES THAT ALLEGATION,/3000REIN/PAJ:160 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  34  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:06-17-14 /X:THE COURT ORDERS THE EVIDENCE RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES FOR SAFE KEEPING,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/CONTD:HEARING/
